nodes.label: AI for repetitive and long tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I usually use AI to complete repetitive, long tasks

nodes.label: AI for email writing
nodes.grounding_span: or to help with email writing

nodes.label: AI for batch editing with clear instructions
nodes.label_negative: AI making logic errors in batch tasks
nodes.grounding_span: editing a large set of HTML files to make the same changes

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool inspired by colleagues
nodes.label_negative: Not using AI despite colleague demonstration
nodes.grounding_span: Seeing that it was possible, and that it saved him a few hours of manual work inspired me

nodes.label: AI for debugging when not interested in learning
nodes.label_negative: Manual debugging for learning when interested
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to debug it and on the first try, the code that it returned worked exactly as I imagined

nodes.label: Manual task for learning when passionate
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle tasks where completing the task would help me learn something and the task is related to something I am interested in

nodes.label: Deliberate skill maintenance despite AI use
nodes.label_negative: Skill atrophy due to AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I make deliberate choices to maintain my software development skills through practice

nodes.label: AI adaptability to large codebases and precision
nodes.label_negative: AI limited to small, imprecise tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that AI becomes more adaptable to large codebases and templates, and precise in writing code

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saved him a few hours of manual work

nodes.label: Professional competence and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: maintain my software development skills through practice

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI debugging success
nodes.grounding_span: This made me feel satisfied because it saved me a lot of time and produced the exact result I wanted

nodes.label: Preference for manual learning when interested
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle tasks where completing the task would help me learn something

nodes.label: Openness to expanding AI use with better adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to continue to use AI to automate monotonous tasks

nodes.label: Task decomposition and iterative correction
nodes.grounding_span: I usually give it all the instructions at once, and then if something goes wrong, I work on the task together with the AI

nodes.label: Selective engagement based on interest and learning goals
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle tasks where completing the task would help me learn something and the task is related to something I am interested in
